---
title: "FFT and Trigonometric Polynomials"
bibliography: ../../references.bib
---

Source inspiration: [Numerical Methods Modules](https://web.archive.org/web/20190808102217/http://mathfaculty.fullerton.edu/mathews/n2003/NumericalUndergradMod.html).

## Animation Focus

This page will prioritize intuitive animations that show the algorithm behavior step by step.

### Planned animation ideas

- Visual state evolution of the method
- Parameter sensitivity controls
- Convergence and failure side-by-side comparison

## Derivation Notes (Planned)

Short derivations will be added to explain the core equations and assumptions.

## Worked Example (Planned)

A compact numerical example with intermediate steps will be included.

## Implementation Notes (Planned)

Implementation details, numerical stability notes, and practical pitfalls will be added.

## Legacy Animation Inventory (Stub)

- Legacy module page: [FFT and Trigonometric Polynomials](http://localhost:8000/n2003/FourierSeriesMod.html) (ok)
- Animation links found in module Animations paragraph: 4
- Unique animation portals: 2

### Animation Portals

1. [Fourier Series](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/FourierSeries/FourierSeries/FourierSeries.html) (ok)
2. [Discrete Fourier series FFT](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/FourierSeries/FourierFFT/FourierFFT.html) (error)

- Animation item links found: 5

### Animation Items

1. [Fourier Series](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/FourierSeries/FourierSeries/FourierSeries1/FourierSeriesaa.html) (error)
- Main animated GIF count: 0
2. [Fourier Series](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/FourierSeries/FourierSeries/FourierSeries2/FourierSeriesbb.html) (error)
- Main animated GIF count: 0
3. [Fourier Series](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/FourierSeries/FourierSeries/FourierSeries3/FourierSeriescc.html) (error)
- Main animated GIF count: 0
4. [Fourier Series](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/FourierSeries/FourierSeries/FourierSeries4/FourierSeriesdd.html) (error)
- Main animated GIF count: 0
5. [Fourier Series](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/FourierSeries/FourierSeries/FourierSeries5/FourierSeriesee.html) (error)
- Main animated GIF count: 0
